mapper.select: SELECT message_id, conversation_id, session_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, metadata_json, getstream_message_id, created_at FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT message_id, conversation_id, session_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, metadata_json, getstream_message_id, created_at FROM message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT message_id, conversation_id, session_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, metadata_json, getstream_message_id, created_at FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid AND session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (message_id, conversation_id, session_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, metadata_json, getstream_message_id, created_at) VALUES (#{messageId}::uuid, #{conversationId}::uuid, #{sessionId}::uuid, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{metadataJson}, #{getstreamMessageId}, NOW())
